title: taraxacum xanthostigma
intro: Taraxacum xanthostigma, also known as yellow dandelion, is a hybrid plant species of the dandelion family, resulting from a cross between the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale) and the yellow dandelion (Taraxacum erythrospermum). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are high in taraxasterol, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum xanthostigma include its potential to support liver and digestive health, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-bacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum xanthostigma can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
